copy.org_type_prompt: What type of organisation is it? A short label is enough — e.g. fitness studio, school, professional association, brand.

options.intent_b2c: I'm here as an individual — to create and/or join communities
options.intent_b2b: I'm a business owner setting up a community for my organisation

placeholders.sub_communities: Team A, Beginners, Staff — or leave blank
placeholders.associations: e.g. early-stage ventures, machine learning in health, cross-border teams
placeholders.strengths: e.g. turning research into products, stakeholder alignment, technical writing
placeholders.recommend: e.g. Sapiens, a favorite podcast, or a local place

ui.defer_body: A good profile is easier to build when you are not rushing. We will save what you have shared so far, and you can come back anytime from your dashboard. To help you finish while it is still fresh, we will send two gentle reminders: one after 24 hours and one after 48 hours.
ui.professional_card_meta: About 2 minutes · up to 6 steps · 2 questions + optional LinkedIn · {{status}}

tour.dashboard_desc: Your home base — see your communities, notifications, and quick actions all in one place.
tour.profile_desc: Where others learn about you. Keep it fresh and it'll power better connections.
tour.followers_desc: See who follows you and who you follow across your communities.
tour.networking_desc: Discover people in your networks — Steve helps match you with relevant connections.
tour.settings_desc: Manage your email, notifications, and privacy preferences.

professional: Themes you are known for professionally (career-wide)
Strengths and domains you have built over time
Optional: LinkedIn (so people can follow you there)

tiers.guidance_free: That fits the Free Community tier: up to {{max}} members. I can create it now so you can start inviting people.
tiers.guidance_enterprise:
That sounds like an Enterprise network. Enterprise is custom pricing, so the best next step is to speak with the sales team.

I can still create your network now on the Free Community tier, so it will support up to {{max}} members until an Enterprise plan is in place.
tiers.guidance_paid:
That fits {{tier}}: up to {{max}} members for {{price}}.

I can still create your network now on the Free Community tier, so it will support up to {{maxFree}} members until you subscribe to {{tier}}.

summary.empty: Nothing is on your public profile yet — we'll build it together.
summary.name: • Name: {{value}}

validation.linkedin_empty: Paste your LinkedIn profile URL, or skip this step.
validation.linkedin_host: Please use a LinkedIn profile URL, for example https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourname.
validation.linkedin_personal: Use your personal profile URL (the one with /in/yourname).
validation.linkedin_not_personal: That is not a personal LinkedIn profile URL.
validation.linkedin_invalid: Please enter a valid LinkedIn profile URL, or skip.
validation.linkedin_fallback: Please add a valid LinkedIn profile URL, or skip this step.

errors.defer_save: I could not save that just now. Please try again, or keep going for now.
errors.defer_timeout: Saving is taking longer than expected. Please try again.
errors.photo_upload: Hmm, that didn't work. Try again or skip for now.
errors.photo_network: Network issue — try again or skip for now.
errors.cv_network: Network issue — check your connection and try again.
errors.cv_save: Could not save your CV details. Try again or continue manually.
errors.cv_save_network: Network issue saving your CV details. Try again in a moment.
errors.bootstrap_fail: Could not create communities right now.

messages.resume_welcome: Welcome back. I saved your progress, so we will pick up where you left off.
messages.b2b_value: Great. Let's shape a private network for your organisation — a trusted place for the right people to connect, share updates, and keep useful context together. I'll ask a few quick questions so we can set it up properly.
messages.b2b_network_size:
Great. Let's shape a private network for your organisation — a trusted place for the right people to connect, share updates, and keep useful context together.

First, about how many people do you expect in this network? This helps me point you toward the right setup.
messages.b2b_parent_name: What should we call this network?
messages.b2b_sub_names: Optional: list **sub-community** names, separated by commas (smaller invite-only private communities under your network). Or skip for now.
messages.welcome_profile_builder:
{{greeting}} Let's update your profile together.

I'll walk you through a few quick questions — anything you've already filled in, we can skip. Ready?
messages.welcome_invited:
{{greeting}} I'm Steve. Great to meet you. I see you were invited to {{community}}.

I'll help you build a profile that feels like you, so people in your private communities know who they're talking to. We'll keep it light - you can change anything later. Ready?
messages.welcome_default:
{{greeting}} I'm Steve. Great to meet you.

I'll ask a few simple questions so your profile feels like you, and so the right people can understand who you are inside C-Point. We'll keep it light - you can change anything later. Ready?
messages.pb_confirm: I have your **{{field}}** as **{{value}}** — still correct?
messages.pb_edit: What should I use for your **{{field}}**?
messages.name_confirm: I have your name as {{firstName}} {{lastName}} — is that right?
messages.name_ask: Let's start with your name. What should people call you here? First and last name is best.
messages.location_confirm: Just to confirm — did you mean {{city}}, {{country}}?
messages.location_city: {{country}} — great! Which city are you based in?
messages.photo_ask: Add a profile picture if you want people to recognize you more easily.
messages.section_picker: You can choose what to build next. Each section is short and finite, so this is not an open-ended interview.
messages.personal_intro: Let's build your Personal Identity. This has 6 steps, including 4 dedicated questions, public social links, and your personal bio draft. It takes about 2 minutes and helps people understand the human side of you.
messages.personal_subtitle: A warmer profile section for conversation, interests, and personality.
messages.talk_all_day:
What are a few things you could happily talk about for ages?

Examples: AI, leadership, travel, startups
messages.reach_out:
What would you like people to reach out to you about?

Examples: coffee chats, brainstorming, partnerships, new ventures
messages.professional_ask: What do you do professionally, or what are you building right now? Something like "Product Manager at Google" or "Founder, building in fintech" works great.
messages.professional_confirm_role:
Here's what I got:

Role: {{role}}
Company: not specified

Does that look right, or would you like to add a company?
messages.professional_intro: Let's build your Professional Identity. This has up to 6 steps (plus optional CV import), including two short questions about your broader professional track record, optional LinkedIn, and your bio draft. It takes about 2 minutes and helps make your work and collaboration context clear.
messages.professional_subtitle: A practical profile section for work, expertise, and collaboration.
messages.cv_upload: Upload your CV as a **PDF** (max 10 MB). I will read the text and fill your current role, company, and past experience. If you continue, we can store a **private copy** in your account (when cloud storage is enabled) so you can repopulate from Edit Profile later.
messages.professional_associations: What themes, topics, or kinds of work are you often associated with professionally? Think across your career — not only your current title. (e.g. climate policy, product discovery, community building)
messages.professional_strengths: What strengths, domains, or skills have you built up over your professional life — things people might know you for? This can be broad and is not limited to what your current job asks of you.
messages.linkedin_ask: Optional: if you want people in C-Point to find you on LinkedIn, paste your public profile URL (the one with /in/yourname). Others can use it to follow or connect with you there. You can skip this.
messages.recommend: Recommend one book, film, podcast, place, or idea you think others might enjoy.
messages.optional_social:
Optional: share your Instagram, X, or TikTok links so other members in your networks can find your public profiles.

Paste one URL per line, or skip.
messages.journey: What is something your networks should know about you? Feel free to share an achievement you are proud of or a highlight that shapes who you are today.
messages.profile_review: Here is the profile we built together. You can edit either section later from your profile.
messages.enriching_complete: Your profile is complete! No public enrichment step for now.
messages.review_complete: Profile setup complete! You can always edit details later.
messages.bootstrap_need_name: I still need a name for your main network — what should we call it?
messages.bootstrap_success: You're set — your network shell is ready. Now let's finish your profile so people know who's leading the network.
messages.bootstrap_error:
Hmm — {{error}}

Let's try a different name for your main network.
messages.bootstrap_network_error: Something went wrong creating your communities. Let's try your main network name again.
messages.complete:
You're all set! Your profile is live.

I'm always here if you need anything — just DM me or tag @Steve in any chat.

A richer profile makes it easier for people to understand who you are, what you care about, and where collaboration might make sense. You can add more background, interests, and goals on Edit Profile, which also helps me make better introductions across your networks.
messages.bio_personal_intro: Here's a personal bio based on what you told me:
messages.bio_professional_intro: Here's a professional bio based on what you told me:
messages.bio_compose_fail: I couldn't compose your {{kind}} bio right now — would you like to write one yourself?
messages.bio_compose_error: Something went wrong. Want to write your own {{kind}} bio instead?
messages.defer_saved: Saved. You can come back anytime from your dashboard, and I will send two gentle reminders while this is still fresh.
messages.sales_email_opened: I opened an email to the sales team. You can still continue creating the network now.
messages.edit_name: No problem! What's your first and last name?
messages.edit_location: No problem! Where are you based? Please include the country.
messages.edit_professional: No problem! What do you do professionally?
messages.edit_company: What company do you work at?
messages.go_back_start: We're at the beginning — no previous questions to go back to.
messages.gibberish: Hmm, that doesn't look quite right. Would you like to skip this question?
messages.gibberish_skip: No problem — you can always fill this in later from your profile.
messages.skip_photo: No problem — you can always add one later from your profile.
messages.name_need_first: I need at least a first name! What's your first and last name?
messages.location_fail: I couldn't quite place that location. No worries — you can set it later from your profile.
messages.linkedin_saved: Saved. Your LinkedIn link will show on your profile so others can find you there.
messages.social_saved: Saved — those public profile links are on file.
messages.social_skip: No problem — you can add links later from your profile.
messages.journey_thanks: Thanks for sharing — this helps paint a fuller picture of who you are.
messages.cv_stored: A private copy of your PDF was saved so you can reuse it from Edit Profile.
messages.cv_not_stored: (CV file was not stored — cloud storage may be off.)
messages.off_script_fallback: Interesting! Let's come back to that. For now, let's finish getting you set up.
messages.off_script_error: Great thought! Let's finish setting up your profile first.
messages.enrichment_added: Great choices! I've added {{count}} item to your profile.
messages.enrichment_added_other: Great choices! I've added {{count}} items to your profile.
messages.manual_bio_edit: Go ahead — tweak it however you'd like. I'll save this version for the current section.
messages.redo_bio: No problem — write your own version. 2-3 sentences is perfect.

off_script_questions.name: What's your first and last name?
off_script_questions.journey: What should your network remember about your journey?
off_script_questions.talk_all_day: What are the things you could talk about all day?
off_script_questions.recommend: Recommend a book, movie, or TV show to your network.
off_script_questions.reach_out: What do you want people to reach out to you about?
off_script_questions.b2b_network_size: How many people do you expect in this network?
off_script_questions.b2b_tier_guidance: Review the recommended tier, then continue creating the network.
off_script_questions.b2b_parent_name: What should we call this network?
off_script_questions.b2b_sub_names: List sub-communities separated by commas, or use the skip button.
off_script_questions.cv_upload: Upload your CV as a PDF.
off_script_questions.cv_review: Review what we extracted from your CV.

user_echo.personal_section: Personal Identity - about 2 minutes - 6 steps - 4 questions
user_echo.professional_section: Professional Identity - about 2 minutes - up to 6 steps - 2 questions + optional LinkedIn
user_echo.intent_b2c: I'm here as an individual — to create and/or join communities
user_echo.intent_b2b: I'm a business owner setting up a community for my organisation
